themes.headline: FIRST EARNINGS CALL AS A LISTED COMPANY
themes.detail: Maiden investor call. CEO Nimesh Shah hosted; new IR + CMDO leadership team assembled for the listed structure.

themes.headline: Total MF QAAUM ₹10.8T (+23.2% YoY, +6.1% QoQ) — second-largest AMC; 13.3% share
themes.detail: Largest market share in active schemes (13.5%) at ₹9.1T QAAUM.

themes.headline: Industry: QAAUM ₹81.0T (+18.1% YoY); equity QAAUM ₹44T (+16.7% YoY)
Industry SIP at ₹310 bn in Dec '25 (vs ₹294 bn in Sep, ₹264 bn YoY)
themes.detail: Sustained acceleration in monthly SIP contributions.

channelMix.note: ICICI Bank channel + national distributors + MFDs

events.label: Listed on Indian exchanges — first investor call as a listed company

quotes.text: A warm welcome to our first earnings conference call as a listed company.
